book_claims.claim: Specialty breads used as breakfast items in the Longevity Diet.

supplementary_research.finding: Walnut-enriched whole-grain bread shows significantly higher omega-3 ALA content; walnut polyphenols (ellagitannins) remain bioavailable after baking.
Daily consumption of walnut-enriched foods reduces LDL cholesterol and improves vascular endothelial function.

nutrient_highlights.bioavailability_notes: Plant omega-3; partial conversion to EPA (~8%); anti-inflammatory precursor
Metabolized by gut microbiota to urolithins A and B; potent mitophagy activators improving mitochondrial function
Prebiotic effect feeds urolithin-producing bacteria, amplifying walnut polyphenol benefits

synergies.description: Ellagitannins from walnuts and anthocyanins from blueberries synergistically inhibit NF-kB and reduce cardiovascular risk markers
Probiotic bacteria in yogurt enhance urolithin production from walnut ellagitannins, amplifying mitochondrial health benefits
Oleic acid improves absorption of walnut's fat-soluble vitamin E and tocopherols
